reviews.comment:
Mala atención de la mujer del servicompras. Parecía que nos hacía un favor en atendernos. Faltaba media hora para cerrar, y ya nos estaba corriendo.

(Translated by Google)
The woman at the convenience store was terrible. She acted like she was doing us a favor by helping us. It was half an hour before closing time, and she was already rushing us out.
